message:
models install: print copy-paste air-gap script on Windows TCP race

When asupersync's TLS client fails with the known Windows TCP connect
race (WSAENOTCONN / os error 10057), emit a ready-to-paste bash and
PowerShell script that curl/Invoke-WebRequest each manifest file using
the pinned revision, then install via --from-file.

- Add ModelManifest::air_gap_bash_script / air_gap_powershell_script
  that emit scripts against the manifest's pinned revision + optional
  mirror base URL (so checksums match after download).
- In run_models_install, detect the Windows connect-race signature
  (cfg!(windows) || "10057" || "socket is not connected" ||
  "WSAENOTCONN") and print both scripts before the CliError so users
  see a fix path, not just a stack trace.
- Point the hint at the printed script in that branch.

Refs: #193. Does not fix the underlying asupersync race (tracked
separately); gives Windows users a fast, discoverable workaround.
